stories.headline: Amazon Is Dumping Its Sam Altman Movie - Puck
stories.summary: ‘Artificial,’ the nearly-finished film directed by Luca Guadagnino and starring Andrew Garfield as the controversial OpenAI leader, will be shopped to other studios, Amazon tells me.

stories.headline: ‘Toy Story 5’ Heading To Franchise Record At Thursday Night Box Office - Deadline
stories.summary: 'Toy Story 5' is headed to franchise record in previews with around $14M.

stories.headline: Matt Damon Crashes ‘Jimmy Kimmel Live!’ in a Trojan Horse to Troll Him: ‘I Did It!’ - Variety
stories.summary: “The Odyssey” actor Matt Damon took his bit with Jimmy Kimmel to a new level Thursday night.

stories.headline: Peacock Gives Series Order to ‘Dungeon Crawler Carl’ TV Series From Seth MacFarlane’s Fuzzy Door, Chris Yost - Variety
stories.summary: Peacock has given a series order to ‘Dungeon Crawler Carl’ TV series from Seth MacFarlane’s Fuzzy Door and writer Chris Yost.

stories.headline: Comedian Carlos Mencia faces 12 felony charges for failing to report more than $8M in earnings - AP News
stories.summary: Comedian Carlos Mencia has been arrested and charged with 12 felonies for allegedly failing to report or pay taxes on over $8 million in earnings. Los Angeles County District Attorney Nathan Hochman…
